mapper.sql: Id, barcode, agent_No, stock_code, case_no, order_no, model_no, in_time, in_username, quantity, locationNo, remain_qty, status, prepare_qty, inventory_keys, create_time, create_user, update_time, update_user
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo._cs_agent_imp_detail
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo._cs_agent_imp_detail (Id, barcode, agent_No, stock_code, case_no, order_no, model_no, in_time, in_username, quantity, locationNo, remain_qty, status, prepare_qty, inventory_keys, create_time, create_user, update_time, update_user) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{barcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{agentNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stockCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{caseNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{inUsername,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{locationno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remainQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{prepareQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{inventoryKeys,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

update dbo._cs_agent_imp_detail
Id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
barcode = #{record.barcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
agent_No = #{record.agentNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
